required_fields.label: Client agency or organization
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Department of Veterans Affairs, Office of Information Technology

required_fields.label: Scope of work performed
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the full scope of work you performed on this contract...

required_fields.label: Key challenges and how you solved them
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the most significant challenges encountered and how your team addressed them...

required_fields.label: Measurable outcomes and results
required_fields.placeholder: Quantifiable results: cost savings, efficiency gains, metrics improved, deadlines met...

optional_fields.label: Target solicitation this supports
optional_fields.placeholder: Solicitation number of the opportunity you are pursuing

optional_fields.label: Requirements from target solicitation to map to
optional_fields.placeholder: Key requirements from the new opportunity that this past performance demonstrates...

optional_fields.label: Subcontractor roles
optional_fields.placeholder: Any subcontractors involved and their roles...

optional_fields.label: Client reference contact
optional_fields.placeholder: Name, title, phone, email of the client point of contact

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload CPARS reports, performance evaluations, or award letters
Upload the target solicitation for relevance mapping

sections.label: Project Overview
sections.instructions: Provide context on the contract including client mission, urgency, and why this work mattered. Set the stage for demonstrating competence.

sections.label: Scope and Complexity
sections.instructions: Detail the technical and management complexity of the work performed. Emphasize elements that mirror the target opportunity's requirements.

sections.label: Challenges and Solutions
sections.instructions: Describe 2-3 significant challenges and your innovative solutions. Use the Problem-Action-Result format. Quantify where possible.

sections.label: Outcomes and Results
sections.instructions: Present measurable outcomes with specific metrics. Cost savings, schedule performance, quality indicators, and client satisfaction scores.

sections.label: Relevance to Target Opportunity
sections.instructions: Explicitly connect this past performance to the requirements of the target solicitation. Draw parallels in scope, complexity, environment, and mission.

sections.label: Client Reference
sections.instructions: Provide client reference contact information including name, title, organization, phone, and email.
